form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes off a 41 day let-up. Most recently made ground from midfield; 2nd of 14 at Sanliurfa on March 4 over 1800m, 2.5 len behind Beratkiz carrying 54.5kg at $17.60. Before that scored a big 9 len win at Sanliurfa January 19 over 1300m defeating Anandi with 58kg at $7.20. Has the ability to take this out.
